economic_notes: First Nation is economically dependent on Indigenous Services Canada. Legal claims outstanding: A.D. Hanslip Excavating & Demolition for $177,422 and Minty's Moving Ltd. for $320,000.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Five consolidated subsidiaries: Government, Education Authority, Health Program, Employment and Training, Housing Authority. No GBEs identified. Large decrease in ISC funding from $18M (2022) to $11M (2023) due to prior year including major capital project funding (water treatment plant). Construction in progress dropped significantly from $12.85M to $1.85M as water treatment plant was completed and transferred to infrastructure assets. Two outstanding legal claims totalling ~$497,422. No schedule of remuneration provided. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC ($11,036,946) minus CMHC ($289,631) minus ESDC ($184,221) = $6,375,066.
